description_long: This awning features a rectangular canopy with alternating green and blue horizontal stripes, creating a visually striking pattern. The canopy is supported by a pair of brown, angled cross-braced legs, giving it a freestanding and portable appearance. The structure appears to be made primarily of fabric stretched over a lightweight metal or wooden frame. The edges of the canopy are straight and unadorned, with no visible decorative trim or valance. The underside of the awning is shaded, providing shelter from sun or rain, and the overall design is simple and functional. There is no visible branding, signage, or additional embellishments on the canopy.
description: A striped green and blue awning with a straight-edged canopy, supported by angled brown cross-braced legs. The design is simple, functional, and unbranded.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slanted canopy and the brown cross-braced support legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the striped canopy and the symmetrical support structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slanted canopy and support legs seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the green and blue horizontal stripes across the entire canopy surface.
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with no decorative trim
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with angled cross-braced legs
